framework.name: AP2 as A2A/MCP Extension (Not Standalone)
framework.description: AP2 positions itself explicitly as an extension layer for Google's A2A and Anthropic's MCP protocols, not a competing standard. This is a smart standards strategy — parasitic adoption on existing protocol momentum rather than building from scratch.
framework.raw_quote: This protocol, designed as an extension for emerging agent-to-agent (A2A) and model-context protocols (MCP), establishes a secure and reliable framework for AI-driven commerce.

source.title: AP2 specification - AP2 - Agent Payments Protocol Documentation
